visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic bottle of water with a blue cap, located behind a red soda can.
A red soda can with white lettering, positioned directly in front of the water bottle.
A brown plastic bottle with a teal cap, to the left of the water bottle.
A green soda can with white lettering, to the right of the red can.
A brown paper bag standing behind all the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is blocking the front of the clear water bottle and must be moved first to provide access.
The water bottle is now clear and can be picked up.
